# services.xidlehook

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.xidlehook`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.xidlehook.detect-sleep` | `boolean` | Whether to enable detecting when the system wakes up from a suspended state and resetting the idle timer. |
| `services.xidlehook.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable xidlehook systemd service. |
| `services.xidlehook.environment` | `attribute set of string` | Extra environment variables to be exported in the script. These options are passed unescaped as export name=value . |
| `services.xidlehook.not-when-audio` | `boolean` | Disable locking when audio is playing. |
| `services.xidlehook.not-when-fullscreen` | `boolean` | Disable locking when a fullscreen application is in use. |
| `services.xidlehook.once` | `boolean` | Whether to enable running the program once and exiting. |
| `services.xidlehook.package` | `package` | The xidlehook package to use. |
| `services.xidlehook.timers` | `list of (submodule)` | A set of commands to be executed after a specific idle timeout. The commands specified in command and canceller are passed escaped to the script. To use or re-use environment variables that are script-dependent, specify them in the environment section. |
